ddt:Target.Name: ClimBoxGen2_v36
ddt:Target.Description:
======================== = ClimBox Gen2 - BHTC = ========================
V34 - 25/08/2020=> Ajout VIN+CRC pour APV
v31 -- 08/11:19 -- Ajout DTC A4C7 et A4E1
v30 -- ajout de DTC et de DID
V29 -- rajout de la valeur 9 sur CL_WindshieldType
V28-- rajout des valeurs 25 et 27 pour le paramètre CL_CTPType -- rajout de la valeur 3 sur CL_withsteeringheater + DID
V27 -- Modification in identification of DTC for LARC and Front Seat Heater Modification of the Configuration name for CAN architecture and LIN Architecture Added auto ident for X07ph1 SW 1831
V26 -- Modification for JFC MY2018
V25 -- 29/03/2018 -- B.Uhlrich Added Vehicles : X07 ph1/ph2 CAREG ICE DAIMLER 1725; 1737; 1744; 1802
V24 -- 27/10/2017 -- M. Dumitru Added vehicles : xHAph2
V23 -- 23/06/2017 -- M. Dumitru Added vehicles : xNN
V22 -- 17/02/2016 -- Th.Allain Values 11-20 added to CL_FrontHVACType ------ V21 -- 15/12/2015 -- Th.Allain Value 10 added to CL_FrontHVACType OutputControl changed to pass DDT check v1.7 ------ V20 -- 06/10/15-- C.Duval -- Autoident X07VE v19- 01/07/2015 - Georgian C. Updated CL_FrontHVACType
V18 -- 27/05/2015 -- added vehicle : HFE V17 -- 04/05/2015 -- Bug Corection V16 -- 24/02/2015 -- C.Duval Autoident X07VE
V15 -- 29/10/2014 -- Th.Allain Correction of OH_ACCompPowerUsed (for CMF1) : resolution changed from 25 to 50. Added vehicles : xZG, xZJ ------ V14 -- 06/06/2014 -- Th.Allain Correction on steppers screen : . Update failures for Motor3 & Motor4 Update of CL_WithControlPanel ------ V13 -- 26/05/2014 -- Th.Allain Correction for auto configuration on D5 SW : . Add CL_WithSED to $3B85 / $2185 . Update configuration screens Added vehicles : x79ph2, xHA, xGA, xZH, xZI ------ V12 -- 06/03/2014 -- Th.Allain Correction for auto configuration JFC : . Remove CL_WithSED from $3B85 . Remove CL_NissanDestination from $3B85 . Change mask of $3B85 ------ V11 -- 18/02/2014 -- Th.Allain Include CL_WithSED configuration data : . Update of $3B85 & $2185 frames . Additional frames : $3B22 & $2122 . Update of configuration screens Include HLS internal variable reading (for engineering purpose) : . Additional frames : $2112, $2113, $2121, $211B, $211C, $211D, $2133, $2134 Add vehicles : xFA, xFB, xFD, xFF & xFG ------ V10 DataWrite.GlobalConfiguration: Change value of the byte 60 to 00 Change value of the byte 67 to 00 Deselection of maintability report for request WriteDataByLocalId.ClimatAreaConfig ------ V09.0 Global update According to message set V20 for CMF1 According to message set 5 for X07 According to LLS_Diag_Requirement_v15 ------ V08.0 Upgrade AutoIdent Upgrade maintenability report Correction I/O controlpanel light ------ v07.0 ML Update and fix bug on CMF1 panels Update CL_xx Ready for x07 DC Fix minor bugs in panels T4 Correction to be good with configuration file Suppress maintenability report in Nissan Request Suppress maintenability report in 21Fx request ------ v06 : Update request & screen for Nissan Renaming labels generic DTC Change the format of the IO controls compliant to Daimler Odx format Add RearHVACType & FrontHVACType config Add Vin CRC in ECU's ID Correction of OH_ClimTempDisplay Correction on screen RCP ------ Update done by M.Legout v05: X07 & T4 screens corrections v05.1 // for T4 project// Add vehcileOutsidelockedState to the BCM frame for T4 Add CustomerDeparture for T4 projects Associate VehicleSpeed with request Brake_CANHS_R01 Bug to be fixed. Change IH_vehicleStateExtented to IH_VehicleStateforClim ------ Database done by T.BILLAUX v04 : Version for SW20E0 Add X07 screens below DIESC system requirements Update of I/O control ------ Database done by I.POPA & P. GALLOU v01 : -- first release issue from X10 Draft for X82 only Use for developpement only. ------ v02 : Draft for X82 only Use for developpement only. ------ v3.1 : Draft for X82, X07, xFC, P32 Use for developpement only. 1rt Delivery for Daimler X07 SxS project

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by True Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by True Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by True Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Trizone with temperature and with distribution
with front defrost +heat Reflect by CAN
Front control Panel/Central Panel Lighting and LCD control
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) - PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
CP Type 1 : X10 CAREG / X07 EV CAREG RSA
CP Type 2 : X10 CHAUFFO / X07 EV CHAUFFO RSA
CP Type 3 : CAREG X07 ICE RSA
CP Type 4 : X07 ICE & EV CAREG Daimler
CP Type 9 : X07 ICE & EV CHAUFFO Daimler
CP Type 12 : CP HFE CAREG without HFS
CP Type 14 : CP HFE CAREG with HFS
Running in idle mode or stopped
Multimedia Display + Front Control Panel + RCP
With seat heating control FL+ RR
With seat heating control FR+ RR
With seat heating control FL+FR+ RR
With seat heating control RL + RR
With seat heating control FL+ RL + RR
With seat heating control FR+ RL + RR
With seat heating control FL+FR+ RL + RR
With seat heating feedback FL+ RR
With seat heating feedback FR+ RR
With seat heating feedback FL+FR+ RR
With seat heating feedback RL + RR
With seat heating feedback FL+ RL + RR
With seat heating feedback FR+ RL + RR
With seat heating feedback FL+FR+ RL + RR
Architecture type 1=T4(X82) / T4 Edison X07 ph2
Load Cut Off For life On Board
Load Cut Off For life On Board 2
Load Cut Off For Pulse Compatibilty
means rear off mode not activated
Low speed engine fan speed request
Mid speed engine fan speed request
High speed engine fan speed request
Thermal comfort eco advice not requested
Do not use memory for manual REC
Do not use memory for manual FRE
DEF door open when auto, DEF door closed when manual
DEF door open when auto, DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door open when manual
DEF door closed when auto, DEF door closed when manual
Turn ON compressor when CAV SW is operated
Do not turn ON compressor when CAV SW is operated
Do not accept CAV SW operations when A/C SW is OFF
When CAV SW is operated compressor must be OFF

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: FailuresDetect.All
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen
